use_cases: Selecting multiple tags or categories in a content management system
Filtering data by multiple criteria in dashboards
Assigning multiple users or values in a form field
Choosing multiple options from a dropdown in settings
Building multi-select input for e-commerce product attributes
ai_summary: A multiple selector component that allows users to select multiple items from a list, displaying chosen values as dismissible badges or tags. Includes keyboard navigation support and hover states for enhanced interactivity. Part of a shadcn-style component system with customizable badge variants.
